steps.description: Combine PDF- and web-extracted CSV files into a single interim table.
Remove rows whose pathogen_name matches yeast/fungal/virus/mammalian substring hints (helpers in scripts/utils.py).
Canonicalize measurement_unit labels; coerce measurement_value to a numeric scalar string (strip comparison symbols; ranges → max endpoint; ± → main component).
Uppercase peptide sequences and remove whitespace or invalid characters.
Map NA, N/A, -, empty strings to null-like values for nullable string columns (MIC coercion already applied earlier; peptide_sequence retains normalized residues only).
Drop rows with empty peptide_sequence after sequence normalization.
Drop rows that are identical across all schema fields except record_id (same peptide, pathogen, assay conditions, MIC, source), then deduplicate remaining record_ids.
Write schema-aligned columns to the publication dataset CSV (scripts/clean_dataset.py).
Run rules in specs/validation_rules.json via scripts/validate_project.py on the finalized dataset.
